title: refactor: deduplicate model pricing badges
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Replaces sparse optional `ModelPrice` pricing fields with one typed `prices` list.
- Centralizes price badge grouping/rendering in `price-badge.tsx` for desktop and mobile rows.
- Sorts per-pollen by numeric `realAvgCost` instead of parsing rounded display text.
- Net diff against current `main`: 8 files, 318 insertions, 373 deletions.

Checks:
- `npx biome check --write enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/models/calculations.ts enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/models/model-catalog.ts enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/models/model-icons.tsx enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/models/model-row.tsx enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/models/model-table.tsx enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/models/price-badge.tsx enter.pollinations.ai/frontend/src/components/models/types.ts enter.pollinations.ai/test/pricing-data.test.ts`
- `npm run test --workspace pollinations-enter -- pricing-data.test.ts`
- `npm run typecheck --workspace pollinations-enter`
- `npm run build:frontend --workspace pollinations-enter`
- `git diff --check origin/main`

Note: validation used temporary symlinks to the existing local dependency tree; they were removed before commit.

gist.headline: Tidying up the price tags
gist.blurb: We've swept through the model pricing code, deduplicating badges and making the underlying math much cleaner. Less code, same great models!
gist.summary: Refactored the frontend model pricing components to use a centralized `prices` list and sort by numeric `realAvgCost` instead of parsed display text.
gist.impact: This cleanup removes over 50 lines of redundant code and makes the pricing UI components easier to maintain for future model additions.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing tiny price tags or badges in a neat row. A cute robot helper sweeping up old code snippets.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny shop apron, neatly organizing lime green (#ecf874) price tags on a wooden shelf. A chunky pixel robot with a monitor head sweeps up old paper code snippets nearby. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
